title: briza stricta
intro: Briza stricta, also known as the Blue Pimpernel or Quaking Grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Briza stricta include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Briza stricta can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
